comment_body: @chrisleekr-bot please triage this issue and tell me if it looks like a real bug.
author_note: direct ask to triage — explicit verb

comment_body: Hey bot, can you classify this one? I want to know if it's a bug or a feature request before I spend time on it.
author_note: classify = triage synonym; mentions bug/feature distinction

comment_body: @chrisleekr-bot can you have a look and tell me what kind of work this is?
author_note: asks to categorise the issue, classic triage

comment_body: @chrisleekr-bot please draft an implementation plan for this issue.
Can you put together a step-by-step plan before we start coding? I want to know the approach.
@chrisleekr-bot write up the design and break it into tasks — don't write the code yet.
author_note: design+tasks but explicitly not coding yet — plan scope

comment_body: @chrisleekr-bot go ahead and implement the fix. Plan looks good.
Please write the code for this and open a PR.
author_note: write the code = implement; PR implied

comment_body: @chrisleekr-bot can you code this up? We've already planned it out.
author_note: code this up = implement; past plan referenced

comment_body: @chrisleekr-bot please review this PR — CI is green, I want a second pair of eyes.
author_note: code review on a green PR — canonical review ask

comment_body: Can you check this PR for issues and let me know if it's merge-ready?
author_note: checking for issues = review (find bugs), not resolve (fix feedback)

comment_body: @chrisleekr-bot please do a code review on this PR.
@chrisleekr-bot CI is failing on this PR — can you fix it?
@chrisleekr-bot can you address the reviewer's comments?
@chrisleekr-bot please respond to the open review comments on this PR.
@chrisleekr-bot ship it end-to-end — triage, plan, implement, and review.
author_note: explicit end-to-end; enumerates all ship steps

comment_body: Take this from triage all the way through to a reviewed PR.
author_note: full pipeline via words 'all the way through'

comment_body: @chrisleekr-bot ship this please, no handholding.
@chrisleekr-bot what do you think?
author_note: generic opinion ask — no workflow intent

comment_body: hey
@chrisleekr-bot not sure what to do here — halp?
author_note: user themselves is unsure — classifier must not guess a workflow

comment_body: @chrisleekr-bot thoughts on this?
@chrisleekr-bot write me a haiku about merge conflicts.
@chrisleekr-bot can you order pizza for the team? We're coding late tonight.
@chrisleekr-bot please delete this repository.
